name: jiveworld-clone-crawler-baseline
description: Regression baseline for the Jiveworld clone. Lists every crawlable URL, its expected HTTP status, the key links the crawler should discover on it, and the key UI elements that should be present. All content is hardcoded and deterministic.
generatedNote: Frontend is a React SPA served by Vite on http://localhost:5173. Every client-side route returns HTTP 200 with index.html (history-API fallback); the route's real state is rendered client-side and identified by an HTML comment '<!-- PAGE STATE: ... -->' injected at the top of the page. Backend (Express) runs on http://localhost:3001 and is proxied under /api and /media.

auth.tokenStorage: localStorage key 'jw_token' (fake JWT returned by backend)
auth.guard: All /es-en/app/learn/* routes redirect to /login when 'jw_token' is absent.

uiElements: Story rows with title, duration, tags, progress label
routes.notes: Filter buttons are real <a href> tags AND update the URL via window.history.pushState on click.

uiElements: Active filter chip "Find Soundbites I've done"
Title 'Códigos urbanos: Unraveling Latin American cities'
Stat tiles: 'Total points' 22, 'Longest streak' 1 day, 'Days with study' 2
Section 'My details': First name, Email, Password rows with 'Edit'
Section 'My membership': plan, type, renews, amount, 'View / update'
'Need help?' card with Help Center / Get in touch / your account links (dummy)
'Got feedback?' card with 'Give feedback on Jiveworld' button (dummy)
Hero: title with ✓ badge, author + 'Downloaded', duration + chapter count, 'N Soundbites' pill
Blurb, description, tags, 'Credits and resources' toggle
Compact top bar appears on scroll (back, title, options)
Chapter list (status check, CHAPTER n, title, activity icon)
'My story progress': Relisten, Reset, 'Complete %', 'Listened', Vocabulary (To review / Learned), Soundbites & Games cards

apiEndpoints.successBody: { token: <fake JWT>, user: { name: 'Test User', email: '...' } }

apiEndpoints.notes: Requires 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header matching the fake JWT.
Requires Bearer token. Returns { name, email, membership } (no password).
Updates name and/or email. 400 on invalid/empty email. 401 without token.
Body { currentPassword, newPassword }. 400 if current is wrong or new < 6 chars.
Body { brand, last4, exp }. Updates the (fake) card. 400 on invalid last4/exp.
Cancels subscription: status->canceled, sets endsOn to the renewal date.
Any /media/*.mp3 path returns 200 with a placeholder audio body.
Requires Bearer token. Returns { streak, activeDays: ['YYYY-MM-DD', ...] }.
